headline: Atos SE announces appeal of the amended final judgment in the TriZetto litigation
summary: Press Release Atos SE announces appeal of the amended final judgment in the TriZetto litigation Paris, France – May 20, 2026 – In connection with the litigation between Syntel and TriZetto (a subsidiary of Cognizant), Atos filed a notice of appeal on May 19, 2026, before the United States Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit against the Amended Final Judgment entered on April 29, 2026, whereby the United States District Court for the Southern District of New York ordered Atos and its subsidia
